text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 11 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287 

Lyrics

 
Voices in my head
Say that the world has ended
Voices in my head
Keep telling me i'm not wrong
Voices in my head
Say that the world has ended
Voices in my head
Keep telling me i'm not wrong

Dark
Light
Grey
Let me out!
Cold
Warm
Hot
I'm on fire!

From sublime to despair
Every second is changing
It's mass confusion

From sublime to despair
Every second is changing
It's mass confusion

Trapped inside this living hell
I can't stay sick
I can't get well
My body aches
My mind will break
I wish to die for my own sake
